title: StackCalc Revived
description: Rewrite of TomB_134's Fabric client mod with new features.
body:
# StackCalc Revived

**StackCalc Revived** is a rewrite of **TomB_134**'s Fabric client mod that can calculate often repeated math tasks while playing **Minecraft** - items to stacks, shulker boxes or double chests. **StackCalc Revived** improves code style and offers some new small QOL features.

## Usage
Open chat and type in whatever number you want, then add `s` suffix (e.g `1234s`) and press `TAB` key.

![stacks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SyberiaK/StackCalc/master/media/stacks.gif)

You can use `sb` or `dc` suffixes to calculate shulker boxes or double chests as well.

![shulkers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SyberiaK/StackCalc/master/media/shulkers.gif)
![double chests](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SyberiaK/StackCalc/master/media/double_chests.gif)

**1.1 feature:** You can also change stack size by typing `-<stack size>` after the suffix.

![stacks-16](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SyberiaK/StackCalc/master/media/stacks-16.gif)
![double chests-234](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SyberiaK/StackCalc/master/media/double_chests-234.gif)
